text:
Did I hear some noise about tank bottoms?

#oott
U.S. REFINERIES produce more diesel to offset loss of output from Russia, Asia and the Gulf: https://t.co/HHkdLzpHr2

A handful of oil tankers were seen conducting ship-to-ship transfers off the coast of Oman, a sign that ships are continuing to sail through the Strait of Hormuz before offloading their cargoes onto other vessels after recent Iranian attacks.

At least four tankers were transferring cargoes near the ports of Fujairah in the United Arab Emirates and Sohar in Oman, satellite images from the European Union’s Copernicus browser showed. Those areas have been the main spots where ships shuttling in and out of Hormuz have transferred their cargoes onto vessels that would ultimately sail on to their eventual destination
#oott
https://t.co/GE30ClmNnw

New Mexico regulators have rejected, for a second time, applications for a natural gas pipeline across state lands that would supply power systems at a planned Oracle Corp. data center project.

Approving the rights-of-way and business lease requested by pipeline operator Energy Transfer LP would not be “in the best interests” of the state, according to a July 14 letter from the New Mexico State Land Office
https://t.co/9GbbGN5Q7W
Chevron to sign MOUs with Iraq for West Qurna 2 and Nassiriya oilfields #oott https://t.co/6d6g0pTXEx

At their peak, US diesel futures prices (blue) more than doubled from late-December levels, while retail diesel prices in Beijing (white) only rose 36% at their peak in early April.

Diesel futures rallying again back to 85% above late-Dec while China only 8% higher.

That's not Chinese demand-destructive pricing.

(Indexed to late-December)

Spending the day with Chinese oil data.

Would appreciate it if no would did anything distracting. https://t.co/ExPzo4cqjs
US forces have reportedly boarded and seized an Iranian oil tanker near Oman
Bloomberg: oil refiners are enjoying the best ever processing margins https://t.co/OLnx6SNzVo

What's interersting about (fka) WEN YAO (9288095) is that while in pursuit, she changed her name from LAN JING to AZHIN on 2026-07-16 at 02:36 and then her flag from Curacao to Iran at 03:30 UTC. We can also see the Iranian flag in the video footage. She is fully laden with Iranian fuel oil. #OOTT #IranWar
